install_msg: SIN Server Hub installed. Load it with `[p]load sinserverhub`, then run `[p]slash sync`. Slash command is `/server`. v4 uses cleaner slash edit subcommands.
name: sinserverhub
short: SIN Corp game server info hub.
description: Red-DiscordBot cog for sharing game server status, IPs, passwords, workshop links, notes, join instructions, restart alerts, and cleaner slash edit commands.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores server board configuration per Discord server only.
